hero.title: Ambitious leaders don't look for a vendor. They look for a growth partner.
hero.subtitle: We build digital ecosystems that generate leads, credibility, and revenue. For entrepreneurs who refuse mediocrity.
hero.trustProof: 20+ projects delivered — millions generated for our clients

painPoints.title: Your website is costing you money. Every single day.
painPoints.subtitle: These 3 signals indicate your digital presence is sabotaging your growth.

visibility.title: Invisible where your clients search
visibility.description: Your competitors are capturing the traffic you deserve. Every day without Google visibility means prospects signing with someone else.

speed.title: 3 seconds. That's all you get.
speed.description: Beyond that, 53% of visitors leave. A slow site doesn't just lose visitors — it loses revenue.

leads.title: A website that generates nothing
leads.description: You're paying for hosting, domain, maintenance. For zero return. That's not an investment — it's an expense.

services.title: 4 levers. One objective: your growth.
services.subtitle: We don't sell websites. We build systems that generate measurable results for your business.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Design that doesn't just look good. It guides, convinces, and converts. Every screen is engineered to turn visitors into clients.

development.title: Web Development
development.description: Fast, secure sites built to scale. Technology serving your ambition, not the other way around.

seo.title: SEO & Performance
seo.description: Looking good isn't enough. You need to be found. We position your site where your clients search, turning traffic into revenue.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.description: Stores that don't just display products. They sell. Optimized purchase journeys, maximized average cart, rising conversions.

portfolio.title: Results, not promises.
portfolio.subtitle: Every project below transformed a business. Yours is next.

dkrEat.title: Dakar Eat
dkrEat.challenge: Dakar Eat needed to digitize their ordering process. It was 100% phone-based, causing errors and lost customers during peak hours.
dkrEat.solutionTags: UX Design, Online Ordering, Admin Dashboard, Local SEO
dkrEat.quote: AgaiGency transformed our business. In 3 months, our online orders skyrocketed.
dkrEat.description: Complete platform for a Senegalese restaurant: showcase site, online ordering, admin dashboard with client tracking, influencer management and real-time commissions.
dkrEat.heroSubtitle: A complete digital tool for authentic Senegalese dining

website.title: The Website
website.description: A modern and warm showcase site highlighting authentic Senegalese cuisine. Intuitive navigation, interactive menu with online ordering, and responsive design optimized for conversion.

dashboard.title: The Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: A comprehensive dashboard enabling the restaurant owner to manage orders, products, influencer partnerships and commissions in real time. Detailed client tracking and performance analytics.

results.title: Results
results.description: An all-in-one digital solution that transformed the restaurant's management and boosted its online visibility.

nisware.title: Nisware
nisware.description: Proximity-based social network: 24h ephemeral content, live events, alerts and deals shared by people around you. Responsive landing page + Android application.
nisware.heroSubtitle: The real-world social network — see what's happening around you in real time

landing.title: The Landing Page
landing.description: A clean and modern landing page presenting the Nisware concept. Responsive design optimized for desktop, tablet and mobile with direct APK download.

concept.title: The Concept
concept.description: Social networks connect us to the whole world, but none connect us to what's happening around us. Nisware solves this with local, ephemeral content shared by nearby people.

results.title: Features
results.description: Markets & meetups, concerts & events, promos & deals, alerts & incidents, neighborhood life, local tourism — all visible for 24h within a 3km radius.

duo2mc.title: Duo2MC
duo2mc.description: Complete website for a Master of Ceremonies & DJ duo: premium showcase, booking system, online payment, marketing funnel and 21 optimized pages.
duo2mc.heroSubtitle: Two voices. One vision. An experience that leaves its mark.

website.title: The Showcase Website
website.description: A dark & gold premium website presenting wedding and corporate services. Smooth navigation, dedicated pages for weddings, corporate events, pricing plans and client testimonials.

booking.title: The Booking System
booking.description: A complete booking journey with Calendly scheduling, inquiry form, secure payment system and automatic confirmation.

results.title: Results
results.description: A complete digital ecosystem with conversion funnel, webinar, client onboarding and offer management — turning every visit into a booking.

prospectPro.title: ProspectPro
prospectPro.description: All-in-one sales prospecting tool: Google Maps & Pappers scraping, lead management with automatic scoring, email campaigns and real-time performance analytics.
prospectPro.heroSubtitle: The smart prospecting tool that turns your searches into clients

dashboard.title: The Dashboard
dashboard.description: Complete overview of your prospecting: total leads, qualified leads, active campaigns and open rates. Quick actions to launch scraping, manage leads or create a campaign.

scraping.title: The Scraping Engine
scraping.description: Automated lead extraction from Google Maps and Pappers. Configuration by business type, location and result count. Automatic enrichment of collected data.

campaigns.title: The Campaigns
campaigns.description: Full email campaign management with real-time tracking: recipients, sends, opens, clicks, replies and bounces. Custom template creation.

results.title: Results
results.description: Detailed analytics with score distribution, leads by source and status. A comprehensive analytics dashboard to optimize your prospecting.

villaAngelie.title: La Villa Angélie
villaAngelie.description: Elegant website for a prestigious reception venue in Oise, France: villa presentation, photo gallery, wedding & event packages, pre-booking form and refined design.
villaAngelie.heroSubtitle: Your perfect day starts here — an exceptional reception venue between Senlis and Chantilly

website.title: The Showcase Website
website.description: A refined website with serif typography and a gold & cream palette, showcasing the charm and elegance of this unique reception venue. Smooth navigation and immersive experience.

villa.title: The Villa
villa.description: Detailed presentation with filtered photo gallery, virtual tour of indoor and outdoor spaces, guest capacity and premium amenities for unforgettable events.

prestations.title: The Services
prestations.description: Bespoke packages for weddings, receptions and private events. Detailed offerings, customization options and dedicated support for every celebration.

results.title: Results
results.description: A premium showcase website that reflects the venue's prestige and facilitates contact with a smooth and intuitive pre-booking journey.

salleArtdoise.title: L'Art d'Oise
salleArtdoise.statLabel: of modular spaces for your events
salleArtdoise.challenge: L'Art d'Oise, a premium event venue in Saint-Maximin (Oise), needed a digital presence worthy of its high-end services. No online visibility, contact limited to phone calls, and no way to showcase the diversity of its spaces.
salleArtdoise.solutionTags: Premium Design, Photo Gallery, Multi-step Quote Form, Local SEO, Responsive
salleArtdoise.quote: The website perfectly reflects the elegance of our venue. Quote requests surged from the moment we went live.
salleArtdoise.description: Premium showcase website for a 750m² event venue in Oise, France: space presentations, filtered photo gallery, 8-step custom quote form, client testimonials, and refined gold & cream design.
salleArtdoise.heroSubtitle: Where your finest moments come to life — an exceptional event venue in Saint-Maximin

website.title: The Showcase Website
website.description: A refined gold & cream website with serif typography, highlighting the exceptional spaces of this event venue. Smooth navigation with dedicated sections for the venue, gallery, and amenities.

espaces.title: The Spaces
espaces.description: Detailed presentation of each space: The Grand Hall (750m², 300 seated, 400 standing), the Salon d'Honneur, and the terrace. Technical specs with guest capacity and immersive photography.

devis.title: The Quote Form
devis.description: A custom 8-step quote request journey: event type, date, number of guests, desired services. A seamless experience that qualifies each prospect before the first contact.

results.title: Results
results.description: A premium showcase website that reflects the venue's prestige and generates qualified quote requests through an optimized conversion journey.

domaineMoulinVilleteint.title: Domaine Moulin de Villeteint
domaineMoulinVilleteint.statLabel: of privatizable nature for your events
domaineMoulinVilleteint.challenge: Domaine Moulin de Villeteint, an exceptional reception estate in Cires-lès-Mello (Oise), needed a digital presence worthy of its unique setting: 50,000m² of nature, private lake, secret clearing, and swimming pool. No existing online presence to showcase this one-of-a-kind venue.
domaineMoulinVilleteint.solutionTags: Premium Nature Design, Filtered Gallery, Day Timeline, Quote Form, Online Pre-booking, Local SEO
domaineMoulinVilleteint.quote: The website perfectly captures the soul of the estate. Visit requests doubled within the first month.
domaineMoulinVilleteint.description: Premium showcase website for a 50,000m² reception estate in Oise, France: presentation of 6 distinct spaces, filtered photo gallery, day timeline, multi-step quote form, online pre-booking, and refined nature-inspired design.
domaineMoulinVilleteint.heroSubtitle: A character estate to celebrate your most precious moments — 45 minutes from Paris

website.title: The Showcase Website
website.description: A refined nature-inspired website with a champagne & ivory palette, showcasing the 50,000m² of this exceptional estate. Immersive navigation between spaces, gallery, and day timeline.

espaces.title: The Spaces
espaces.description: Detailed presentation of 6 spaces: The Grand Parks, Intimate Gardens, Secret Clearing, Private Lake, Swimming Pool, and Tennis Court. Technical specs with guest capacity and immersive photography.

devis.title: The Quote Form
devis.description: A custom quote request journey: event type, date, number of guests, desired spaces. Complemented by an online pre-booking system to secure a date.

results.title: Results
results.description: A premium showcase website that highlights the estate's unique character and generates qualified visit and quote requests through an immersive user journey.

process.title: 5 steps. Zero improvisation.
process.subtitle: Every step is designed to minimize risk and maximize return on investment.

discovery.title: Strategic Diagnosis
discovery.description: Before we code, we understand. Your market, your competitors, your growth objectives. No superficial brief — a thorough business diagnosis.

design.title: Concept & Design
design.description: Every mockup is validated by conversion principles, not just aesthetics. Beautiful and high-performing.

development.title: Development
development.description: Clean code, cutting-edge technology, obsessive performance. Your site loads fast, ranks well, and scales without friction.

testing.title: Validation & Optimization
testing.description: Rigorous cross-device testing, journey optimization, performance audits. Nothing ships without being flawless.

launch.title: Launch & Acceleration
launch.description: Go-live, training, KPI monitoring. Your site doesn't stop at launch — that's where growth begins.

about.title: Not an agency. A growth partner.
about.description: AgaiGency is named after the person who inspires me every day: my wife. From that inspiration came an obsession — that every euro invested in digital should deliver concrete results. Too many leaders pay a premium for websites that generate nothing. Our mission: build digital tools that produce measurable returns. No empty promises. Verifiable performance.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: The most performant technologies in service of your business goals.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: No compromises. Every detail is engineered for performance and credibility.

results.title: Measurable ROI
results.description: Every project is measured. Every euro invested must deliver returns.

testimonials.title: They trusted us. Here's what happened.
testimonials.subtitle: We don't promise results. We deliver them.

client1.name: Moussa D.
client1.quote: AgaiGency perfectly understood our vision. The website and admin dashboard transformed how we manage the restaurant. Result: +40% online orders in the first month.

client2.name: Kévin & Marvin
client2.quote: Exceptional work. Our website perfectly reflects the premium image we wanted. The booking system works flawlessly and our clients love the experience.

client3.name: Amadou S.
client3.quote: Professionalism, responsiveness, and creativity. The team delivered a landing page and application that exceeded our expectations. I recommend 100%.

client4.name: Ben
client4.quote: AgaiGency built our SaaS platform from scratch: scraping, lead management, email campaigns and analytics. A custom tool that revolutionized our sales prospecting.

faq.title: Before we work together
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions serious leaders ask before investing.

price.question: How much does a professional website cost?
price.answer: We don't size a cost — we size an investment. Our projects start from $2,000 for a strategic showcase website. For custom business applications, expect $10,000+. Every dollar is justified by a clear performance objective. We establish a detailed investment plan before we begin.

timeline.question: What are the delivery timelines?
timeline.answer: A strategic showcase site: 3 to 5 weeks. A custom application: 6 to 12 weeks. We prioritize quality and performance over speed. A precise timeline with milestones is defined from day one.

maintenance.question: Do you offer maintenance services?
maintenance.answer: A high-performing site today can become obsolete tomorrow. Our maintenance plans guarantee security, performance, and continuous evolution. Your investment is protected over time.

seo.question: Will my site be optimized for SEO?
seo.answer: This isn't optional — it's a prerequisite. Every site we deliver is optimized for search: technical architecture, load times, semantic markup, metadata. We can also manage your SEO strategy long-term for compounding results.

results.criticalVerdict: Your website is currently losing clients due to fundamental technical errors. These issues directly impact your Google visibility.
